use_cases: Animated hero section background for landing pages
Visual backdrop for hero sections in SaaS and product websites
Decorative flowing gradient effect for marketing sites
Ambient visual atmosphere for creative portfolios
Dynamic background for feature announcement pages
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered aurora flow effect component that renders an animated gradient background with noise-based distortion and soft glow. Built with OGL, it creates a mesmerizing purple-to-cyan aurora effect with continuous time-based animation. Designed as a drop-in hero background for landing pages and marketing sites seeking a visually striking, modern aesthetic.
